auth.consentText1: By participating in this study from the University of Oviedo, you contribute by providing data for a research project (reference 30_RRI_2023) whose objective is to evaluate the feasibility of identity impersonation detection mechanisms.
auth.consentText2: Your data will be processed in the study in a completely anonymized manner under an identification code and stored with security systems, strictly complying with the GDPR and current data protection regulations.
auth.consentText3: By checking the following box, you give your express consent for the research team to process your data exclusively for the purposes described.
auth.acceptTerms: I have read and agree to participate in the study under the conditions described.

freeOffer.description2: in one of the product images.

infoPopover.title: Instructions
infoPopover.step1: Hold down on a product to select it
infoPopover.step2: Drag the selected products to the deletion zone

initialForm.title: Initial form
initialForm.ecommerceFrequency: How often do you use e-commerce websites?
initialForm.deviceQuestion: Which device do you use most for online shopping?

end.doubleTapFinish: Double click to go to questionnaire
end.shareMessage_part1:
📢 We invite you to participate in an academic study by the *University of Oviedo* on how people use a digital platform during an online shopping process! 📱

You will carry out a brief shopping simulation as if you were a real user. Your participation is very important and will only take a few minutes.

Access the study through the link from your mobile phone, follow the instructions, and complete the indicated tasks.
end.shareMessage_part2: Thank you very much for your time and collaboration! 🙌

susForm.title: Final form
susForm.question1: 1. I think that I would like to use this system frequently.
susForm.question2: 2. I found the system unnecessarily complex.
susForm.question3: 3. I thought the system was easy to use.
susForm.question4: 4. I think that I would need the support of a technical person to be able to use this system.
susForm.question5: 5. I found the various functions in this system were well integrated.
susForm.question6: 6. I thought there was too much inconsistency in this system.
susForm.question7: 7. I would imagine that most people would learn to use this system very quickly.
susForm.question8: 8. I found the system very cumbersome to use.
susForm.question9: 9. I felt very confident using the system.
susForm.question10: 10. I needed to learn a lot of things before I could get going with this system.

metadata.title: Carbayo - Experiment
metadata.ogDescription: Tap to start the experiment. Your help is key to our research! ✨
